_comment_top: Example .opencode.json showing the hooks block. Drop this in either ~/.opencode.json (global) or <project>/.opencode.json (project scope). All other .opencode.json fields can sit alongside `hooks` — only the relevant key is shown here.

PreToolUse._comment: RTK-style Bash command rewriter. Compacts noisy commands (cargo test, git status, etc.) by piping through rtk. The rtk binary must be installed (https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk).
Block destructive bash commands matching `rm -rf`. Hook exits 2 if it detects the pattern; opencode surfaces stderr to the agent as the tool result.

PostToolUse._comment: Redact API keys from tool output before the LLM sees it. Pattern-matches sk-* and AKIA* style tokens via updatedToolOutput.
